visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a young woman standing in a brightly lit indoor room with white closets and a venetian-style blind window. She wears a black mini dress and holds up a pair of white cargo pants which have a large, simulated reddish-brown stain on the crotch area, gesturing animatedly with wide eyes and a surprised facial expression. (2) She transitions to a walk-in closet filled with colorful clothes, now wearing a tight pink short-sleeved top and the white cargo pants. She performs a energetic dance move, bending her knees and swinging her arms, demonstrating comfort in the clothing. (3) The scene moves to a large, indoor squash court with light-colored wooden floors and white walls marked with red lines. From a first-person perspective, a hand holds a red and black squash racket; then the camera switches to a medium shot of the woman playing squash, hitting a black ball against the wall with vigor. (4) A close-up shot features her left wrist adorned with a white Garmin smartwatch, displaying fitness tracking data. The scene cuts to a restaurant setting where she uses black chopsticks to lift steaming white noodles from a black stone bowl, followed by a shot of her under a black umbrella walking outside with a man whose face is blurred. (5) She is then seen in a cafe with the man, drinking a glass of iced coffee with foam, followed by a sequence in a bright supermarket where she pushes a silver shopping cart and examines rows of green and black electric rice cookers on metal shelves. (6) Back at home, she demonstrates the absorption of a sanitary pad by pouring a red liquid onto it on a white table; she then changes into yellow and white striped pajamas and showcases a diaper-style sanitary product, pulling its elastic waistband to show its stretchability. (7) The final phase shows her talking directly to the camera with celebratory confetti emojis on screen, followed by a detailed unboxing of a Garmin Venu 4 watch in its black original packaging, placed on a light surface.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 女生的. (2) [Subtitle]: 就是「白褲」. (3) [Subtitle]: 但是！！！ (4) [Subtitle]: 打破這個禁忌！ (5) [Subtitle]: 只貼一片衛生棉 穿著白褲出門. (6) [Subtitle]: 還要挑戰我一直想試的一種運動... (7) [Subtitle]: 是打壁球！ (8) [Subtitle]: 我本來超不愛運動 但這個真的很好玩！ (9) [Subtitle]: 但太久沒做了 全都忘光光了啦. [Variety]: 怕. (10) [Subtitle]: 還是有點怕那顆球. (11) [Logo]: Garmin. [Subtitle]: 消耗的熱量也不錯. (12) [Slogan]: GARMIN Venu 4 很好看吧. (13) [Subtitle]: 運動完的午餐是石鍋越南河粉. (14) [Subtitle]: 愛死河粉了. (15) [Subtitle]: (欺負i人男友的辦法). (16) [Subtitle]: 咖啡時間. (17) [Subtitle]: 你問我為什麼突然跑來超市？ (18) [Subtitle]: 就突然很想買個電鍋. (19) [Subtitle]: 走很久才回家！ (20) [Subtitle]: 今天整天亂跑，褲子還是乾乾淨淨. (21) [Slogan]: 愛康超引力涼感棉 吸得超快！ (22) [Subtitle]: 以前生理期比較不敢這樣穿出門. (23) [Subtitle]: 結果這次使用愛康超引力 完全沒事！ (24) [Subtitle]: 換衣服囉囉. (25) [Subtitle]: 我超級喜歡的 透芯涼感褲型棉. (26) [Subtitle]: 最怕床單被染紅嗎？穿這個就能安心. (27) [Subtitle]: 它棉體有46公分這麼長. (28) [Subtitle]: 加上側邊還多了 防漏設計！ (29) [Subtitle]: 拉這麼大. (30) [Subtitle]: 穿起來很舒服. (31) [Subtitle]: 這樣生理期來，不用再綁手綁腳小心翼翼的了. (32) [Slogan]: 愛康雙11活動開跑. (33) [Slogan]: 記得輸入我的優惠碼 avenue100. (34) [Slogan]: 下單滿千折$100. (35) [Slogan]: 還有機會抽到 來回機票. (36) [Logo]: Garmin. [Slogan]: GARMIN Venu 4 錶款.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 1 blurred male companion/opponent, 1 blurred passer-by in supermarket.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing various outfits: a black dress, a pink short-sleeved top with white cargo pants, and yellow/white striped pajamas.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Interiors of a modern apartment with white wardrobes; a high-ceilinged squash court with light wood floors; a restaurant with dark furniture; a rainy urban street; a brightly lit supermarket with appliance aisles.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a bright, high-pitched female voice speaking rapidly with high energy over an upbeat electronic pop BGM featuring a driving 4/4 beat. The vocal is crisp and centered, characteristic of studio-produced narration. (2) As the scene shifts to the squash court, the voice takes on a slightly more resonant quality, accompanied by sharp, percussive thudding sounds of a ball hitting a wall. Each impact triggers a crisp, short-bandwidth transient. (3) Subtle ambient textures of restaurant chatter and the clink of silverware appear under the narration, while the BGM maintains a consistent volume. A soft liquid-pouring sound is heard during the demonstration phase. (4) The audio concludes with a series of digital sound effects and transition whooshes that punctuate the promotional information, with the voice maintaining a friendly, enthusiastic, and authoritative tone for the final brand call-to-action.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote Icon (愛康) sanitary pads by demonstrating their high absorption and leak-proof capabilities through a 'white pants challenge' involving high physical activity and a full day of typical lifestyle scenarios, supplemented by a cross-promotion for Garmin smartwatches.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct product demonstration, visible brand logos, usage of a discount code ('avenue100'), and explicit mention of brand names.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video effectively uses the 'white pants' trope as a high-stakes visual hook to prove product efficacy. Fast-paced editing and a high vocal arousal level maintain viewer engagement.
